targets.rawSql: SELECT state, COUNT(*)::bigint AS n FROM dag_run WHERE start_date > NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;

panels.title: Slowest DAG runs (7d, top 20 by duration)

targets.rawSql: SELECT dag_id, run_id, state, start_date, end_date, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_date - start_date)))::numeric AS duration_sec FROM dag_run WHERE start_date > NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' - INTERVAL '7 days' AND end_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY duration_sec DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;
SELECT dag_id, run_id, start_date, end_date FROM dag_run WHERE state = 'failed' AND start_date > NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY start_date DESC LIMIT 30;
